items.content:
School's out, the sun is up, and MARVEL SNAP is heading straight for the shoreline. This season, some familiar faces are trading the battlefield for the beach with new cards, new events, fresh albums, and a month full of ways to jump in and make a splash.

Let's take a quick look at what's coming in Marvel Beach Bash!

WEB SHOP BONUS

Purchase the Premium or Super Premium Season Pass on shop.marvelsnap.com and unlock AWESOME bonuses, including a Series 5 SNAP Pack and more.

To ensure you get your rewards:

  • Log in to the game during the new season

    [/*]

  • Log in to the Web Shop and purchase the Premium or Super Premium Pass

    [/*]

  • Reload your SNAP client and claim your new rewards

    [/*]

    Upgrading from Premium → Super Premium will NOT trigger the bonus. You must purchase the pass directly through the Web Shop.

    GOLDEN GAUNTLET 2026

    The next Golden Gauntlet Qualifier takes place on Saturday, June 6. Registration is free, open to all players, and starts on May 29. The tournament will also be broadcast live on Twitch, making it a great way to tune in and earn rewards!

    Whether you're playing or watching, June 6 is the day to jump into the Golden Gauntlet action. Hop into the Official MARVEL SNAP Discord to be notified when registration goes live or catch the live stream on the official @MARVELSNAP Twitch channel!

    Official MARVEL SNAP Discord Official MARVEL SNAP Twitch

    TWITCH DROPS

    Watch your favorite MARVEL SNAP Twitch streamers this season to earn new rewards. Drops will be available from June 4th to 7th and June 22nd to 28th. Don't miss out!

    If you haven't linked your account, visit https://twitch.marvelsnap.com/ to get set up.

    Watch 2 hours to earn: 155 Boosters Watch 4 hours to earn: Premium Mystery Border Watch 6 hours to earn: Premium Mystery Variant

    SEASON PASS

    Purchase the Premium Season Pass and bring Jeff the Baby Dolphin to your roster, or go Super Premium to add Venus and even more seasonal rewards to your collection.

    JEFF THE BABY DOLPHIN SERIES 5 / PREMIUM PASS

    Your cards reveal here with +1 Power. Moveable once.

    VENUS SERIES 5 / SUPER PREMIUM PASS

    When your cards in play are Empowered, give those cards an additional +1 Power.

    NEW CHARACTERS!

    The beach party is just getting started. New cards are arriving throughout the month, with fresh releases in Seasonal SNAP Packs, limited-time events, and more.

    SERIES 5

    This card's cost is reduced by the cost of your deck's top card.

    SERIES 5

    When you draw a card, add this card's Power to it.

    SERIES 5

    When this is Empowered, add a random 1-Cost character to your hand with that same increase. (if in hand or in play)

    SERIES 5

    When you draw a card, give it -1 Cost if this is your only card here.

    LIMITED TIME EVENT / SERIES 4

    The next time your opponent would start a turn with bonus Energy, they don't get it.

    LIMITED TIME EVENT / SERIES 4

    On Reveal: Give the last character EACH player played last turn +3 Power.

    NEW TO SNAP PACKS

    June 17: Ikari – Seasonal Series 4 SNAP Pack

    June 29: Stick – Seasonal Series 4 SNAP Pack

    NEW LOCATIONS

    \

    Boardwalk: End of Turn: Give the lowest-Power card(s) here +1 Power.

    Sandcastle: After turn 5, end the game.

    LIMITED TIME GAME MODES

    For more information on upcoming game modes and more, be sure to join our Discord! discord.gg/marvelsnap

    \

    High Voltage: Overdrive is back from June 11–18 with fast games, big energy, and plenty of chances to make explosive plays. The new S4 card, Quicksand, will be available for all players to earn on the reward track. If you're looking for something with a bit more sparkle, there is a brand new System Studios Variant awaiting players on the premium track. Jump in while it lasts and power through matches to add this variant to your collection.

    \

    The Grand Arena opens its doors from June 22–29 and this time we're hosting a Massive Melee of prebuilt decks with ALL 21 CHAMPIONS. Each deck was carefully curated by some of the best minds in the community. Pick your favorite prebuilt deck and battle for glory. Progress through the event to unlock Triton, or go premium and unlock the beautiful new Triton variant from System Studios.

    NEW ALBUMS

    Get all new Variants, Emotes, and rewards by completing new albums!

    Marked by Malia (arrives June 9th) Eligible Variants: Nico Minoru, Pixie, Agent 13, Cassandra Nova, Copycat, Dagger, Mockingbird, Maria Hill, Invisible Woman, Hazmat, Squirrel Girl, Sage Collect 3: Sub-Mariner Your Turn Emote Collect 6: Three Premium Mystery Borders Collect 9: 4000 Collector's Tokens Collect 12: Malia Ewert Namora

    Netease Boardwalk Beats (arrives June 23rd) Eligible Variants: Victoria Hand, Dagger, Speed, Rocket And Groot, Thena, Nocturne, Moonstone, Bullseye, Copycat, Valentina, Iron Man Collect 3: Monstro Chillin Emote Collect 6: Three Premium Mystery Borders Collect 9: 4000 Collector's Tokens Collect 11: Yuhan Wang Doom 2099

    SHOP TAKEOVERS

    Pick up these incredible Y2K inspired variants from Malia Ewart and more in the shop June 9–10.

    Keep the party going with the Netease Beach Variants by Yuhan Wang. Taking over the shop on June 23rd.

    FEATURED SETS

    Featured Sets deliver curated collections of cards and variants with smaller reward pools so you can target specific themes.

    Chibi Pack available June 4–8.

    Who will win the next Golden Gauntlet Qualifier? Join the competition, or tune in for the live broadcast on June 6th to watch an incredible display of strategy and skill. The Champion's deck will be featured in the Card Shop, so you can play what the champions play! Look out for this incredible opportunity from June 11–15 at server reset.

    Discard Variant Pack available June 25–29.

    Now get out there, soak up the sun, and make the most of Marvel Beach Bash. We can't wait to see what decks you build, what plays you discover, and what big beach-day moments you share with us. And don't forget your sunscreen!

items.content:
Hell's Kitchen is under siege. Who's side are you on? The dark and broody Shadowlands Daredevil… or Wilson Fisk doing his best good guy impersonation?

Let's take a quick look at the incredible web shop bonus, then dive into our newest season!

WEB SHOP BONUS

Purchase the Premium or Super Premium Season Pass on shop.marvelsnap.com and unlock AWESOME bonuses, including a Series 5 SNAP Pack and 3 Red Matte Card Borders.

To ensure you get your rewards:

  • Log in to the game during the new season

    [/*]

  • Log into the Web Shop and purchase the Premium or Super Premium Pass

    [/*]

  • Reload your SNAP client and claim your new rewards

    [/*]

    Upgrading from Premium → Super Premium will NOT trigger the bonus. You must purchase the pass directly through the Web Shop.

    TWITCH DROPS

    This season we're bringing you two Twitch Drops campaigns. Drops are available May 19–21 during Sanctum Showdown Surge, and May 28–30 during Team Clash!

    If you haven't linked your account, visit https://twitch.marvelsnap.com/ to get set up. If your button still says "link" but you're earning progress, you can ignore the message and proceed as normal.

    Watch 2 hours to earn: 155 Random Boosters

    Watch 4 hours to earn: Premium Mystery Border

    Watch 6 hours to earn: Premium Mystery Variant

    SEASON PASS

    Purchase the Premium Season Pass and command Shadowlands Daredevil, or go Super Premium to add Wilson Fisk to your roster with an exclusive variant from Viktor Farro.

                           SHADOWLANDS DAREDEVIL

                            PREMIUM PASS / SERIES 5

                                        On Reveal: Shuffle in 3 Demons.

                     When you draw a card with 6 or more Power, +2 Power.

                                        WILSON FISK                     

                      SUPER PREMIUM PASS / SERIES 5

                   Costs 3 if you have the highest Power among cards in play.

    NEW CHARACTERS!

                                                           SERIES 5

          On Reveal: Give one of your 1, 2, and 3-Cost characters +2 Power each.

                                                           SERIES 5

                           When drawn, mark one of your empty locations.                         Objective: Win that location → +1 Max Energy.

                                                           SERIES 5

                              Ongoing: +3 Power for each location where

                                 one of your cards has been destroyed.

                                                           SERIES 5

                          On Reveal: Afflict an enemy card with -2 Power.

              Repeat on a different enemy for each of your unspent Energy.

                                       LIMITED TIME EVENT / SERIES 4

          You can only play this where an enemy is afflicted with negative Power.

                                       LIMITED TIME EVENT / SERIES 4

                                 On Reveal: Give the next card you play

                                       Power equal to this card's Power.

    NEW TO SNAP PACKS

    May 9: Askani'Son – Seasonal Series 4

    May 23: Mother Askani – Seasonal Series 4

    NEW LOCATIONS

    Josie's Bar: Playing 2 cards here in a turn reveals them with +2 Power.

    Island Prison: Cards here can't move.

    LIMITED TIME GAME MODES

    For more information on upcoming game modes and more, be sure to join our Discord! discord.gg/marvelsnap

    We're introducing a new citrus flavored twist on our favorite game of location domination! The new rules will have you surging around the world as you start with 4 energy and 4 cards in hand. But it's not just energy, you earn points way faster! This mode offers a total potential of 4 points on turn 1, 7 points on turn 2, and 9 points by turn 3! Play and progress on the reward track to unlock the new Series 4 card, Ikari.

    Surge is available May 14–21. The shop will remain open for an additional 48 hours.

    Pick a side and take on the competition in this mode that rewards playing favorites. Progress to unlock the new Series 4 card, Stick.

    Team Clash is available May 28 – June 3. The shop will remain open for an additional 48 hours.

    NEW ALBUMS

    Get all new Variants, Emotes, and rewards by completing new albums!

    Iban Coello's On the Grind (May 12)

    Album Variants: Khonshu, The Blob, Agent Venom, Agent Coulson, Super Skrull, Starbrand, Gambit, Scream, Scorn, Arishem Collect 3: Punisher War Machine Angry Emote Collect 6: 3 Premium Mystery Borders Collect 8: 4000 Collector's Tokens Collect 10: Shou Lao Variant

    Envar Painted Lineart (May 26)

    Album Variants: Professor X, Uatu, Joaquin Torres, Werewolf By Night, Diamondback, Cobra, Wiccan, Stature, X-23 Collect 3: Uatu "What" Emote Collect 5: 6 Cosmic Gold Borders Collect 7: White Tiger Variant Collect 9: Scarlet Spider Variant

    SHOP TAKEOVERS

    Iban Coello Variants available May 12–13.

    Envar Painted Lineart Variants available May 26–27.

    FEATURED SETS

    Featured Sets deliver curated collections of cards and variants with smaller reward pools so you can target specific themes.

    Make your deck Iron-clad with this themed set featuring Hulkbuster, Ironheart, Iron Lad, Iron Patriot, Rescue, War Machine, and of course… Iron Man! Available May 14–18.

     

    The Man Without Fear takes center stage. Available May 21–25.

     

    Channel your inner adventurer with fantasy-themed variants. Available May 28 – June 1.

     

    Now get out there, take control of Hell's Kitchen, and make Daredevil proud. See you on the ladder!

items.title: MARVEL SNAP DLC is here just in time for Deckbuilders Fest
items.summary: That's right, MARVEL SNAP is participating in the Steam Deckbuilders Fest from May 4-11. To celebrate, we're launching new bundles and featuring content from the MARVEL SNAP Content Creator program the whole week! Whether you're just gettin
items.content:
That's right, MARVEL SNAP is participating in the Steam Deckbuilders Fest from May 4-11. To celebrate, we're launching new bundles and featuring content from the MARVEL SNAP Content Creator program the whole week!

Whether you're just getting started or looking to supercharge a specific playstyle, there's a bundle built for you. If this IS your first time here, welcome!

Here's the TLDR: The game is free to play, and cards can be unlocked by progressing your Collection Level. Progression is made when you upgrade the cosmetics of your cards which requires Boosters and Credits. If you like to go fast, these bundles will speed up your progression. If you want to jump straight into a specific archetype, these bundles will help you make that happen.

STEAM SPECIAL: ENTRY PACK

The most accessible offer in the lineup, the Entry Pack is a perfect choice for new players. At full price, this would still be one of the best deals out there. With an extra 40% off, this is going to be hard to beat.

  • Doctor Doom - Base Card

    [/*]

  • Doctor Doom - Pior Oberson Variant

    [/*]

  • 310 Doctor Doom Boosters

    [/*]

  • 1,500 Gold

    [/*]

ARCHETYPES? WHAT SHOULD I GET?

If you're just getting started, think about the play style that you typically have fun with. Destroy is for the player that believes a little self sacrifice is worth the explosive value. Discard gives you control of the grave yard and lets you reanimate on command. On Reveal is for the big chain combo player that loves to feel unstoppable. Ready to jump in?

DESTROY STARTER PACK

Smash, Crash, and Chomp. This archetype lets you Destroy cards on both sides of the battlefield to stack power and keep your opponents on edge. This bundle is the powder keg that helps you build the explosive play lines.

  • Headpool + 310 Boosters

    [/*]

  • Venom + 310 Boosters

    [/*]

  • Carnage + 310 Boosters

    [/*]

  • 3,000 Credits

    [/*]

  • 3,000 Tokens

    [/*]

ON REVEAL STARTER PACK

If you believe every card should make an impact when it enters the battlefield, On Reveal might just be for you. With a massive range of effects, and a chance to double down on them with Odin, you'll be off to a thunderous start.

  • Nico Minoru + 310 Boosters

    [/*]

  • Odin + 310 Boosters

    [/*]

  • Arnim Zola + 310 Boosters

    [/*]

  • 3,000 Credits

    [/*]

  • 3,000 Tokens

    [/*]

DISCARD STARTER PACK

Maybe hand manipulation is more your thing? Take this pack and use the power of Moon Knight and Khonshu to Discard cards from both your and your opponents hand to increase your own power, while limiting theirs.

  • Khonshu + 310 Boosters

    [/*]

  • Moon Knight + 310 Boosters

    [/*]

  • Lady Sif + 310 Boosters

    [/*]

  • 3,000 Credits

    [/*]

  • 3,000 Tokens

    [/*]

HEAVY ON THE PROGRESSION

Ready to put boost your Collector Level like it's a speed run? These bundles are great for collecting new cards, and building your collection fast.

LEVEL UP

Ready to climb? The Level Up bundle features Esme Cuckoo with a fantastic variant by Lee Woo-chul, and enough currency to upgrade it twice!

  • Esme Cuckoo - Base Card

    [/*]

  • Esme Cuckoo - Lee Woo-chul Variant

    [/*]

  • 310 Esme Cuckoo Boosters

    [/*]

  • 3,200 Credits

    [/*]

PRESTIGE

The flagship bundle of the lineup. "Prestige" packs in two powerful cards, enough boosters for 4 splits, and a massive haul of resources to speed up your progression:

  • Dragon of the Moon + 310 Boosters

    [/*]

  • Luna Snow + 310 Boosters

    [/*]

  • 5,000 Credits

    [/*]

  • 5,000 Tokens

    [/*]

  • 5,000 Gold

    [/*]

RESOURCE CACHE

Not looking for a specific card? The Resource Cache is a pure currency play for players who want to steer their own collection.

  • 2,500 Credits

    [/*]

  • 2,500 Tokens

    [/*]

  • 3 Silver Metallic Card Borders

    [/*]

Whether you're chasing Infinite and the #1 spot on the ranked ladder, or just want to experiment with new ways to play, there's never been a better time to play on Steam.

items.content:
The world is in peril. Stryfe has assembled his Horsemen, and his Objectives are nearly complete. Who will stop him before it's too late?

Let's take a quick look at the incredible web shop bonus, then dive into our newest season!

WEB SHOP BONUS

Purchase the Premium or Super Premium Season Pass on shop.marvelsnap.com and unlock AWESOME bonuses, including a Series 5 SNAP Pack and 3 Gold Cosmic Card Borders.

To ensure you get your rewards:

  • Log in to the game during the new season

    [/*]

  • Log into the Web Shop and purchase the Premium or Super Premium Pass

    [/*]

  • Reload your SNAP client and claim your new rewards

    [/*]

    Upgrading from Premium → Super Premium will NOT trigger the bonus. You must purchase the pass directly through the Web Shop.

    TWITCH DROPS

    Kick off this season in style by watching your favorite creators to earn great new rewards. Drops are available April 7-12th. If you haven't linked your account, you can visit https://twitch.marvelsnap.com/ to get set up!

    Watch 2 hours to earn: 155 Random Boosters Watch 4 hours to earn: Premium Mystery Border Watch 6 hours to earn: Premium Mystery Variant

    SEASON PASS

    Stryfe is a clone of Nathan Summers, raised by Apocalypse and unimpeded by the Techno-Organic Virus. Purchase the Premium Season Pass and claim this new power. If you purchase the Super Premium Season Pass, you'll also obtain the new skill card, Techno-Organic Virus along with the new System Studios variant.

    STRYFE SERIES 5 / PREMIUM PASS

    Objective: Play 3 On Reveal cards ➡️ Use the highest-Cost On Reveal in your hand. (0/3)

    TECHNO-ORGANIC VIRUS SERIES 5 / SUPER PREMIUM PASS

    On Reveal: Copy this to your hand with +2 Cost. Infect your other cards here. (replace their text)

    Infected cards have "Ongoing: +1 Power for each Techno-Organic Virus you've played."

    LOGIN BONUS

    It’s dangerous out there facing Stryfe all alone, take these login bonuses to help you on your journey.

    7 Day Login Bonus: April 7–14th

    Day 1 — 100 Credits Day 2 — Title: Desolate And Overgrown Day 3 — 1 Common Mystery Border Day 4 — 155 Random Boosters Day 5 — Title: Telepathy Blocking Off, Please Day 6 — 1 Premium Mystery Border Day 7 — 1 Premium Mystery Variant

    14 Day Login Bonus: April 21 – May 5 Day 1 — 50 Credits Day 2 — 65 Random Boosters Day 3 — Title: Feral Crumb Scavenger Day 4 — 1 Common Mystery Border Day 5 — 50 Credits Day 6 — 155 Random Boosters Day 7 — Premium Mystery Variant Day 8 — Title: Psionic Of Lowest Order Day 9 — 50 Credits Day 10 — 1 Premium Mystery Border Day 11 — 65 Random Boosters Day 12 — 125 Credits Day 13 — 1 Premium Mystery Border Day 14 — 500 Collector's Tokens

    NEW CHARACTERS!

    SERIES 5

    Objective: This has 5 or more Power ➡️ Give one of your cards at each location +3 Power. (3/5)

    SERIES 5

    Objective: Your cards are destroyed 4 times ➡️ Resurrect one here with +4 Power. (0/4)

    SERIES 5

    Objective: Cards in play are afflicted with -5 Power ➡️ Put a card from your hand here. (0/5)

    SERIES 5

    Objective: End 2 turns in a row with unspent Energy ➡️ Give your other cards here and in your hand +2 Power. (0/2)

    LIMITED TIME EVENT / SERIES 4

    Activate: Create a 1-Cost card at another location. Increase the Cost each time you're winning here as the turn starts.

    LIMITED TIME EVENT / SERIES 4

    On Reveal: Give the leftmost card in your hand +2 Power and -1 Cost, then copy it.

    NEW TO SNAP PACKS

    April 23: Ozymandias - Seasonal S4

    High Voltage: A weekend of high paced action. Cosmetic based rewards. Available May 2–May 5th at server reset.

    NEW ALBUMS

    Flaviano's Flav-ourful Fabrications (drops April 14th)

    SHOP TAKEOVERS

    Flaviano Cyberpunk Variants available April 14–15.

    Michael Ivan Variants available April 28–29.

    FEATURED SETS

    Featured Sets are our way of delivering uniquely curated sets of cards and variants. The smaller reward pools allow you to target specific themes or archetypes. Get more of what you want!

    West Coast Avengers Featured Set. Available April 16–20.

    Asgard Featured Set. Available April 23–27.

    That's it for now, but if you want to know more about the hows and whys of game design for this season, stay tuned for our Season Launch video featuring Alex Coccia and Jason Yang.

items.title: New Season: X-Men: Origins of Apocalypse
items.summary: Mount up, because En Sabah Nur has arrived and he’s just given his Horsemen a new Objective. That’s right, a new Keyword! Looking forward, we get to see the return of Team Clash and High Voltage: Overdrive, as well as great new art albums f
items.content:
Mount up, because En Sabah Nur has arrived and he’s just given his Horsemen a new Objective. That’s right, a new Keyword! Looking forward, we get to see the return of Team Clash and High Voltage: Overdrive, as well as great new art albums for Dardo Studios and Junggeun Yoon!

Let’s take a quick look at the incredible web shop bonus, then dive into our newest season!

WEB SHOP BONUS

Purchase the Premium or Super Premium Season Pass on shop.marvelsnap.com and unlock AWESOME bonuses, including a Series 5 SNAP Pack and 3 Metallic Gold Borders.

To ensure you get your rewards:

  • Log in to the game during the new season

    [/*]

  • Log into the Web Shop and purchase the Premium or Super Premium Pass

    [/*]

  • Reload your SNAP client and claim your new rewards

    [/*]

    Upgrading from Premium → Super Premium will NOT trigger the bonus. You must purchase the pass directly through the Web Shop.

    NEW KEYWORD: OBJECTIVE

    Objective introduces a brand-new way to play MARVEL SNAP. This new keyword gives you a quest to chase down in the middle of the match, rewarding you with powerful effects once you complete it. The best part? The card tracks what you’ve done all game and progress can be checked if the card is in your hand or in play. If the Objective card is in play, the game will resolve all other effects, then check to see if the Objective is complete. If the conditions are met, the ability will trigger (once per game).

    With En Sabah Nur looming over the battlefield, every turn is filled with big decisions for you and your opponent to make. Whether it builds tension early, delivers an exciting last-turn swing, or creates the ultimate bluffing opportunity, Objective is sure to shake things up. Want to dive deeper into Objective? Don’t miss our Community Spotlight video on Tuesday, March 3rd with ItsGuestGaming, KMBest, and special guest Jules Robins, Principal Game Designer.

    TWITCH DROPS

    WE ARE SO BACK! Kick off this season in style by watching your favorite creators to earn great new rewards. Drops are available on March 3-6th. If you haven’t linked your account, you can visit https://twitch.marvelsnap.com/ to get setup before the big party!

    Watch 2 hours to earn: Mystery Variant Watch 4 hours to earn: Premium Mystery Border Watch 6 hours to earn: Premium Mystery Variant

    GOLDEN GAUNTLET TWITCH DROPS!

    To celebrate the first Golden Gauntlet Qualifier of 2026, we’ll be hosting a special Twitch Drops campaign on Saturday, March 7th. This campaign will only be on the official MARVEL SNAP twitch channel at . Drops will start at 11am PST with the start of the tournament. After the tournament, the stream will replay once to keep the stream active for those that didn’t quite finish their drops. Rather than ending the broadcast with the tournament, we will loop the competition feed to keep the stream active!

    Watch 2 hours to earn: 155 Cable Boosters Watch 4 hours to earn: Cable - Marvel Legends Variant

    For those interested in competing, entering is FREE and registration will begin on February 27th, so stay tuned to the discord and our socials for more information!

    SEASON PASS

    This season we bring forth En Sabah Nur, one of the world’s first mutants. Purchase the Premium Season Pass and claim this new power. If you purchase the Super Premium Season Pass, you’ll also obtain Isca the Unbeaten with the new System Studios variant.

    EN SABAH NUR PREMIUM PASS / SERIES 5

    Objective: Have a full front row at each location ➡️ Transform into Apocalypse, Celestials' Chosen. (0/6)

    On Reveal: Swap the lowest-Power card in your front row at any location with a card from your deck.

     

    ISCA THE UNBEATEN SUPER PREMIUM PASS / SERIES 5

    End of Turn: If you’re losing this location, double this card’s Power.

    NEW CHARACTERS!

    SERIES 5

    Objective: Have 6 different Powers among your other cards in play ➡️ +6 Power. (0/6)

    SERIES 5

    Objective: Play 5 total Cost of created cards ➡️ Randomly destroy up to 4 total Cost of enemy cards. (0/5)

    SERIES 5

    Objective: Have 3 cards that are 4-Cost or higher in play ➡️ Afflict the highest-Cost enemy card with -7 Power. (0/3)

    SERIES 5

    Objective: Have 3 cards with no abilities in play ➡️ Steal 5 Power from an enemy card here. (0/3)

    SERIES 5

    On Reveal: Use 3 On Reveals from cards released before Rama-Tut's time.

     

    LIMITED TIME EVENT / SERIES 4

    On Reveal: Add 2 Rocks to your hand. Give them +1 Power for each of your front-Row characters.

     

    LIMITED TIME EVENT / SERIES 4

    Ongoing: Your Rocks have +3 Power.

    NEW TO SNAP PACKS

    March 15th: Major Victory - Seasonal Series 4 March 26th: Star Hawk - Seasonal Series 4

    NEW LOCATIONS

    Pyramid of Rama-Tut: End of Turn: Add a 3-Power Rock to hand if you have none there.

    Chronosphere Sphinx: Copy the highest-Cost card in your deck into your hand.

    LIMITED TIME GAME MODES

    Team Clash is back! Live out your best team dreams as the Avengers, Guardians of the Galaxy, X-Men, Thunderbolts, or Webslingers! And now, introducing The Brotherhood of Mutants! This event will run from March 12-19th at server reset. The new Series 4 Skill Card, Sandstorm, will be available to earn on the free Event Pass, and a new Sandstorm Variant from Dardo Studios is available as the final reward for the 800 Gold Premium Event Pass.

    High Voltage: Overdrive is here from March 23-30th to keep the energy up high. The new Series 4 Card, Ozymandias, will be available to earn on the free Event Pass, and a new Ozymandias Variant from Dardo Studios is available as the final reward for the 800 Premium Event Pass.

    NEW ALBUMS

    Get all new Variants, Emotes and other Rewards by completing two new albums!

    Collect these amazing Cyberpunk themed Variants from Dardo’s Barcodes to get even more rewards! Album drops March 3rd. Eligible Dardo Variants to complete the album include: Iron Man, Apocalypse, Storm, Cable, Punisher, Professor X, Agent 13, Star-Lord, Red Skull, Nebula, Gamora, and M.O.D.O.K.!

    Collect 3: Rama-Tut Shrug Emote Collect 6: 3 Premium Mystery Borders Collect 9: Juggernaut - Dardo Variant Collect 12: 5000 Collector’s Tokens

    Collect awesome variants from Junggeun Yoon to get some great rewards, available on March 24th. Eligible Junggeun Yoon Variants to complete the album include: Nocturne, Frigga, Jubilee, Mirage, Jean Grey, X-23, Kitty Pryde, Skaar, Cyclops, Silk, Hit-Monkey, and Elektra.

    Collect 3: Gambit Heart Emote Collect 6: 3 Fire Blue Borders Collect 9: Luna Snow - Junggeun Yoon Variant Collect 12: 5000 Collector’s Tokens

    SHOP TAKEOVERS

    Brace for Dardo’s Cyberpunk Variants to take over the shop. Available March 3-4th.

     

    Junggeun Yoon Variants will be in the shop to help fill that new album on March 24-25th.

    FEATURED SETS

    Featured Sets are our way of delivering uniquely curated sets of cards and variants. The smaller reward pools allow you to target specific themes or archetypes. Get more of what you want!

    Who will win the first Golden Gauntlet Qualifier of 2026? Join the competition, or tune in for the live broadcast on March 7th to watch an incredible display of strategy and skill. The Champion’s deck will be featured in the Card Shop so you can play what the champions play! Look out for this incredible opportunity from March 12-17th at server reset. Note: if the winning deck contains En Sabah Nur, that card will not be available in the set. It will still be available with the Premium or Super Premium Season Pass.

    Show your inner dark side, with a collection of Variants just for the Dark Avengers. The Dark Avengers pack includes Variants for Ares, Bullseye, Daken, Gorgon, Marvel Boy, Moonstone, Scorpion, The Sentry, Skaar, USAgent, Venom, and White Widow. Available from March 19-24th at server reset.

    If you’ve made it this far, keep an eye out for Deadpool. I think something’s afoot. Now get out there, earn some great rewards, and don’t forget to check out the Golden Gauntlet on March 7th!

items.content:
The Guardians of the Galaxy are back for another round of Greatest Hits. This season marks the return of Peter Quill, now reborn as Star-Lord, Master of the Sun, bringing some big firepower and even bigger hair.

Alongside new cards, this season also features the return of popular limited-time modes, including Sanctum Showdown and Grand Arena, giving players more ways to compete, experiment, and earn rewards throughout the month. Let’s take a quick look at the Season Pass!

WEB SHOP BONUS

Purchase the Premium or Super Premium Season Pass on shop.marvelsnap.com and unlock AWESOME bonuses, including a Series 5 SNAP Pack and 3 Rainbow Refraction Borders.

To ensure you get your rewards:

  • Log in to the game during the new season

    [/*]

  • Log into the Web Shop and purchase the Premium or Super Premium Pass

    [/*]

  • Reload your SNAP client and claim your new rewards

    [/*]

    Upgrading from Premium → Super Premium will NOT trigger the bonus. You must purchase the pass directly through the Web Shop.

    SEASON PASS

    This season’s Premium Season Pass Card is none other than Star-Lord, Master of the Sun. He creates stellar energy to create powerful, flexible plays that reward timing and precision. Those who channel his energy become legends. Purchase the Super Premium Season Pass and you’ll obtain the Magus Variant from Vincenzo Riccardi.

    SERIES 5

    SERIES 5

    On Reveal: Banish the top card of your deck. If it was 4-Cost or higher, +2 Energy next turn, otherwise give this +4 Power.

     

    SERIES 5

    LIMITED TIME EVENT / SERIES 4

    On Reveal: Add 2 members of the Guardians crew to your hand. Eligible Guardians: Star-Lord, Rocket Raccoon, Groot, Drax, Gamora, Mantis.

     

    LIMITED TIME EVENT / SERIES 4

items.title: New Limited Time Game Mode: Team Clash
items.summary: Assemble your Avengers and swing out your Spiders because it’s time to fight for supremacy and decide which team will rise to the top. Welcome to TEAM CLASH , MARVEL SNAP’s newest limited time game mode! What is Team Clash? Team Clash is th
items.content:
Assemble your Avengers and swing out your Spiders because it’s time to fight for supremacy and decide which team will rise to the top. Welcome to TEAM CLASH, MARVEL SNAP’s newest limited time game mode!

What is Team Clash?

Team Clash is the BRAND NEW game mode that lets you command a team of your favorite characters. There are a total of five teams in this mode and each brings their own unique ability that creates all new synergies and play lines. The new team abilities make sure that you’re leveraging each team’s powerful abilities by using members of the same team.  Additionally, each of the six core characters on each team has their own new unique ability, so when you see the Team Clash logo above their name and unique Team Clash Border on a card, there is a brand new ability that exists only in Team Clash. Characters that share the same team affiliation will be marked with the team logo on the top left corner. 

How do you play?

Start your Team Clash journey by selecting one of five main teams. Each team includes a unique ability that will help boost the abilities or power of your characters in that team. Six of the cards in the deck will be locked to the pre-designated characters, but you will have the option to customize the other 6 cards for the deck with your own collection of cards. 

Once the match begins, everything plays out in classic SNAP fashion, but your team’s mechanics and new character skills will provide opportunities for new play lines and synergies.

The player controlling 2 of the 3 locations after 6 rounds wins the game. Winning will reward you with another ticket for entry as well as 10 XP to progress on the new reward track and 10 Emblems to spend in the shop. If you lose, it’s not all bad - you still get 5 XP and 5 Emblems.

How long will Team Clash be here?

Team Clash will start at 11AM PST (daily reset) on December 18th and will end on December 28th at the daily reset.

Team Clash Economy

Battling in Team Clash always leads to Emblems and Event XP! Climb the ranks of the Clash Pass and claim a variety of rewards. Complete Team Clash Missions to aid in your progress. The new Series 4 Card WIld Child is available for all players in the Free Track. Based on previous LTGMs, we expect the average Free Event Pass player to earn enough XP to unlock Wild Child. Bring all the Emblems you’ve earned to the Clash Shop and choose from a selection of prizes, including the new Series 4 Skill Card Fastball Special, new variants, emotes, and holiday themed borders! There are also Series 3 Card packs available for players early on in their card collection journey. Here are all the details: Rewards Per Match

  • Win = 10 Emblems + 10 XP + 1 Team Ticket

    [/*]

  • Loss = 5 Emblems + 5 XP

    [/*]

  • Tie = 5 Emblems + 5 XP

    [/*]

Team Clash Missions

Complete Team focused Missions to earn more Emblems and XP! Players will receive Missions with varying degrees of requirements that grant either 10, 20, or 40 Emblems and XP. Players will start with 6 total Missions. Missions refill every 8 hours or can be refreshed faster with Gold. Make sure to check which Missions you have active in order to select the right team to complete them! Team Tickets Each match of Team Clash requires one Ticket to enter. Every player will start with 6 tickets when Team Clash opens. Every 8 hours, 4 additional tickets will be added to your total up to the soft cap of 9. This means that if you have 9 Tickets, there will be no additional Tickets added every 8 hours. The timer for the 8 hour ticket reset starts on the first time you enter the Team Clash. If for some reason you choose to test the limits of how many Tickets you can buy and hold at one time, you will be hard capped at 99.

  • Cost per ticket: 10 Gold

Team Clash Event Pass Reward Track

Two new Series 4 Cards are available in this run of Team Clash. Wild Child is available in the Event Pass on the Free Track and Fastball Special can be obtained in the Team Clash Event Shop. We expect the average Free Event Pass player to earn enough Emblems to claim both cards. Team Clash features an Event Pass with two reward tracks: Free and Premium. Progress on both tracks occurs simultaneously, serving as an additional way to earn Emblems, which you can spend in the Team Clash Shop.  The Premium Pass can be purchased for 1,200 Gold and includes all rewards for the 51 milestones.  Players that purchase the Premium Pass will be immediately granted 1,960 XP upon purchase which will skip them to Milestone 15 if purchased while at zero XP. Players will also receive 1x Distressed Gold Border and 2 Team Tickets upon purchasing the Premium Pass.

items.title: New Season: Weapon X
items.summary: Sharpen your claws and steel your nerves because this month we’re diving deep into the cold metal halls of the Weapon X program. This season explores the rage, pain, and raw power forged in the labs that tried to break Wolverine… and failed
items.content:
Sharpen your claws and steel your nerves because this month we’re diving deep into the cold metal halls of the Weapon X program. This season explores the rage, pain, and raw power forged in the labs that tried to break Wolverine… and failed spectacularly. From adamantium nightmares to shattered memories and uncontrollable fury, this season embraces the darker side of mutation, where heroes are made, remade, and rebuilt against their will. The labs might be cold, but the rewards aren’t. Purchase the Premium or Super Premium Season Pass on shop.marvelsnap.com and unlock AWESOME bonuses, including a Colleen Wing variant from Hyeonsick Choi and three Wrapping Paper Borders. To ensure you get your rewards:
  • Log in to the game during the new season[/*]
  • Log into the Web Shop and purchase the Premium or Super Premium Pass[/*]
  • Try not to lose yourself to the seasonal rage[/*] Upgrading from Premium → Super Premium will NOT trigger the bonus. You must purchase the pass directly through the Web Shop.

    SEASON PASS

    The Weapon X program thought they could control him. They were wrong. Pick up the Super Premium Pass to lock down Adamantium Infusion and an exclusive Variant from Jongsup Kim.   

    WEAPON X

    PREMIUM PASS SERIES 5 After one of your other cards is destroyed, +1 Power. After every 3rd time, improve this effect by 1. (0/3)  

    ADAMANTIUM INFUSION

    SUPER PREMIUM PASS SERIES 5 On Reveal: Revive your highest-Power destroyed card here with its Power doubled.

    NEW CHARACTERS!

    The experiment wasn’t done with Wolverine… and Wolverine wasn’t the only experiment. Welcome to the roster of survivors, soldiers, and side effects. SERIES 5 Activate: +2 Power for each 5-Cost or higher card you have here and in hand. SERIES 5 When Discarded: Put this back with -2 Cost. SERIES 5 Activate: Give the next card you play Power equal to this card’s Power. SERIES 5 On Reveal: Give one of your other On Reveal cards at each location +2 Power. Repeat for Ongoing, Activate, and End of Turn. SERIES 5 Activate: If you've had cards discarded and destroyed, afflict front-row enemy cards at each location with -2 Power.   LIMITED TIME EVENT / SERIES 4 When Destroyed: Replace this with a 1-Cost card from your hand or deck with +1 Power. SERIES 4 When Discarded or Destroyed: Randomly split -7 Power among enemy cards. LIMITED TIME EVENT / SERIES 4 On Reveal: Destroy your highest-Power card here to afflict an enemy card here with that much negative Power. LIMITED TIME EVENT / SERIES 4 Ongoing: +4 Power if you’ve discarded a card. +4 Power if one of your cards has been destroyed.

    NEW TO SNAP PACKS

    • Dec 2nd: Spider Punk - Seasonal Series 5[/*]
    • Dec 20th: Hydro-Man - Seasonal Series 4[/*]
    • Jan 4th: Wade Wilson - Seasonal Series 4[/*]

    NEW LOCATIONS

    • Hospice: Changes to card Power are doubled here.[/*]
    • Essex’s Lab: After turn 4, destroy a card. Your others here split its Power.[/*]

    LIMITED TIME GAME MODES

      A very special Grand Arena is coming! Choose from 8 new Champions featuring art from Marvel’s Cosmic Invasion. For an added twist, and due to popular demand, this run will be using prebuilt decks only, so you can focus on getting games in without worrying about tech cards or collection limitations. Try out Captain America’s Shield Throw, Iron Man’s Stark Technology, Rocket Raccoon’s Massive Arsenal, Thanos’ Inevitable and many more beginning on December 5th.   Our brand new mode, Team Clash is here!!! Live out your best team dreams as the Avengers, Guardians of the Galaxy, X-Men, Thunderbolts, or Webslingers! The event will run from December 18-28th at server reset. More information to come in an exclusive video from DeraJN and Ninaisnoob. ALBUMS AND TAKEOVERS Get all new Variants, Emotes and other Rewards by completing two new albums!   Check out the amazing new album featuring Viktor Farro on Dec 15th with a shop takeover lasting two days on Dec 15-16th.    Collect 3: Titania Rage Emote Collect 6: 3 Mystery Borders Collect 9: Bullseye - Viktor Farro Variant Collect 12: 5000 Collector’s Tokens     A brand new He Tianyou album is coming on Dec 30th. Make sure to check out the shop on Dec 30-31st to grab all of the latest drops. Collect 3: 3 Mystery Borders Collect 6: Jean Grey Everything’s Fine Emote Collect 9: Fantomex - He Tianyou Variant Collect 12: 5000 Collector’s Tokens

    FEATURED SETS

      Featured Sets are our way of delivering uniquely curated sets of cards and variants. The smaller reward pools allow you to target specific themes or archetypes. Get more of what you want!   Check out these awesome variants featuring members of the X-Force from December 3rd-9th.     We’ve put away the shorts and t-shirts, it’s time for some winter apparel. The Winter Vacation variants will be here from Dec 16-25th.    This set brings in some of our favorite variants from members of the Weapon X program. Grab them before they escape! Available from December 25-31st.  The Weapon X program shaped some of Marvel’s deadliest mutants, and now you get to unleash them. Experiment. Adapt. Evolve. And above all… share your favorite new decks!

Grab your web-shooters and sling your guitar, Spider-Punk is here and it’s time to jam! This month, we’re turning up the volume and celebrating all things punk. From high-flying riffs to glitching beats, this season is all about energy, creativity, and teamwork across dimensions. Whether you’re a fan of punk rock or just love seeing Spideys from across the multiverse unite, this one’s for you.

WEB SHOP BONUS

We heard it loud and clear, the web shop bonus is a hit. We’re bringing back an encore with EXCLUSIVE bonuses when you purchase the Premium or Super Premium Season Pass at shop.marvelsnap.com. The bonus includes the Black Cat - Ejikure Variant, and 3 White Fire Card Borders! BEWARE! There are proper steps to follow to ensure you get the Web Shop bonus.

  • Step 1: Login to the game during the new season

    [/*]

  • Step 2: Login to the Web Shop and purchase either the Premium or Super Premium Season Pass.

    [/*]

  • Step 3: Profit

    [/*]

  Additionally, Upgrading your pass via the Web Shop will NOT trigger the bonus. You must purchase either the Premium or Super Premium Season Pass on the Web Shop.    

SEASON PASS

Straight from the Spider-Verse comes Hobie Brown, better known as Spider-Punk. He’s a web-slinger who fights with rhythm and heart. Jamming right next to him is Man-Spider, who will be available in both the Super Premium Season Pass with an exclusive variant, and in the Seasonal Series 5 packs for Tokens at the start of the season.   

SPIDER-PUNK

PREMIUM SEASON PASS - SERIES 5 You can move this once. When this moves to a location, steal 2 Power from the highest-Power enemy there.    

MAN-SPIDER

SUPER PREMIUM SEASON PASS - SERIES 5 On Reveal: Merge the last card you played into this. When this merges, double its Power.      

NEW CHARACTERS!

The stage is set and the band is all here, let’s introduce the rest of this season’s characters!   SERIES 5 At the start of each turn, you get +1 Energy if you have any cards with increased Power in play.     SERIES 5 After you play a card with higher Power here, give this +2 Power and move this to another location.     SERIES 5 On Reveal: If your other cards in play cost exactly 8 total, add the top card of your deck here. Set its Power to 8. (0/8)     SERIES 5 On Reveal: Add 2 Thief’s Tools to your hand. Set their Costs to 0 if a card moved last turn.   On Reveal: Give your highest-Power card here +1 Power and move it to the right.   On Reveal: Afflict the 2 highest-Power enemy cards here with -2 Power.   On Reveal: Give your highest-Power card here +2 Power. You get +1 Energy next turn.       SERIES 4 On Reveal: Next turn, you can move one of your cards away from here.     SERIES 4 On Reveal: Copy the text of another card here you revealed this turn.     SERIES 4 On Reveal: Afflict an enemy character here that costs 3 or less with -1 Power and remove its text.     LIMITED TIME EVENT / SERIES 4 On Reveal: Set the Cost of EACH deck's top card to 1.      

NEW TO SNAP PACKS

  • Nov 4th: Zombie Scarlet Witch - Seasonal Series 5

    [/*]

  • Nov 15th: The Hunger - Seasonal Series 4

    [/*]

  • Nov 27th: Zombie Sentry - Seasonal Series 4

    [/*]

   

NEW LOCATIONS

  • Mosh Pit: End of Turn: Give front-row cards here +1 Power.

    [/*]

  • Parker Industries: +2 Energy this turn, but you can only play 1 card.

    [/*]

   

LIMITED TIME GAME MODES

High Voltage is coming back for another weekend edition. This four day event will be another purely cosmetic event, with no unlockable cards. The banned list is rotating back to the original banned list, but more experimentation is coming! Check it out from November 14-18th at server reset.     Sanctum Showdown returns! Your favorite mind-bending location dominating limited time game mode is back November 24th - December 1st at the daily reset. This event features exciting new rewards including the brand new Series 4 card, Hydro-Man. The Sanctum shop will remain open for two full days at the conclusion of the event.    

BRAND NEW ALBUMS

Get all new Variants, Emotes and other Rewards by completing two new albums!   Check out the amazing new album from ARTTREE STUDIOS on November 12th. 

  • Collect 3: 3 Mystery Borders

    [/*]

  • Collect 5: 2 Premium Mystery Borders

    [/*]

  • Collect 7: 2500 Collector’s Tokens

    [/*]

  • Collect 9: Galacta - ARTTREE STUDIOS Variant

    [/*]

  You’ve heard from Leo Chiola, now here’s your chance to collect his album! Available on November 25th. 

  • Collect 3: Spider-Punk Rock On Emote

    [/*]

  • Collect 6: 3 Premium Mystery Borders

    [/*]

  • Collect 9: 4000 Collector’s Tokens

    [/*]

  • Collect 12: The Prowler - Leo Chiola Variant

    [/*]

SHOP TAKEOVERS

Stop by the shop on Nov 12-13th and you’ll find some brand new ARTTREE STUDIOS Variants taking over!    The Spiders are taking over the shop on November 25-26th, featuring brand new art from Leo Chiola.    

FEATURED SETS

Featured Sets are our way of delivering uniquely curated sets of cards and variants. The smaller reward pools allow you to target specific themes or archetypes. These are more expensive than your standard Series packs, but allow you to focus on a much smaller pool of cards. Get more of what you want!   Peni Parker, Spider-Ham, Scarlet Spider, and way more Spider Society Characters and Variants are available in this limited time Featured Set from November 5-11th.   For those who love Anime, we’ve curated some of our favorite Anime style Variants in this Featured Set running from November 18-24th.   Symbiotes love to take over their host, and this time they’ve picked the Featured Sets. Grab some amazing Klyntar picks from November 25th - December 1st  

From rooftops to mosh pits, the Spider-Verse is alive with energy this season. Swing in, build your deck, and find your rhythm, because when it comes to Arachnid Anarchy, every card deserves its moment in the spotlight.

FOR THE HORDE… THE UNDEAD HORDE… The dead are rising and they've brought a brand new Keyword Mechanic along with them. "Horde" will have your opponents shaking in fear as you boost your Zombie Horde with brand new zombified versions of some of your favorite cards. When Horde is played, give Power to your Zombie Horde. If you don't have one, create one at another location first.    

UNDEAD WEB SHOP BONUS

The bonus includes a Collector's Series 5 SNAP PACK and the Arnim Zola - Nightforged Variant.   BEWARE! There are proper steps to follow to ensure you get the Web Shop bonus.

  • Step 1: Login to the game during the new season

    [/*]

  • Step 2: Login to the Web Shop and purchase either the Premium or Super Premium Season Pass.

    [/*]

  • Step 3: Profit

    [/*]

Additionally, Upgrading your pass via the Web Shop will NOT trigger the bonus. You must purchase either the Premium or Super Premium Season Pass on the Web Shop.    

SEASON PASS

HEADPOOL

NEW CHARACTERS!

The zombie plague is spreading to some of the most iconic heroes. It's time to build your undead horde, one spooky new ability at a time.       SERIES 5Ongoing: Your other cards here have +1 Power for each turn you've discarded a card.     SERIES 5On Reveal: Horde +2. Activate: Give 4 of your created cards +1 Power.     SERIES 5Activate: Destroy your other cards here to get +3 Power for each. Move to a location you're losing.     SERIES 5Start of Game: Choose 6 other cards in your deck. On Reveal: Transform those cards into copies of this.         SERIES 4On Reveal: Horde +1, then this gains Power equal to your Zombie Horde.     SERIES 4End of Turn: If you're winning here, discard the leftmost card from your hand.     LIMITED TIME EVENT / SERIES 4 On Reveal: Horde +3.   LIMITED TIME EVENT / SERIES 4On Reveal: Horde +1 for each of your cards at the right location.    

NEW TO SNAP PACKS

Choose your champion and jump into battle using unique decks and powerful skill cards tailored to each hero. Not sure where to start? This mode will also have a new Premium Event Pass for 800 Gold which includes another exclusive variant and more bonus value to help on your journey.

    [/*]

  • Collect 6: Zombie Thumbs Up Emote

    [/*]

  • Collect 9: 6 Gold Chain Borders

    [/*]

  • Collect 12: Living Tribunal - Mooncolony Tarot Variant

    [/*]

   

SHOP TAKEOVER

Stop by the shop on Oct 14-15th and you'll find some brand new Cyberpunk art by Pocket.   Inspired by 2K Games' Marvel's Midnight Suns, these brand new tarot style variants by Mooncolony will be haunting your shop from October 31st - Nov 1st.

Featured Sets are our way of delivering uniquely curated sets of cards and variants. The smaller reward pools allow you to target specific themes or archetypes. These are more expensive than your standard Series packs, but allow you to focus on a much smaller pool of cards. Get more of what you want!   We've collected some of the most frequently played cards from our last run of Sanctum Showdown and included them in this Featured Set running from Oct 15-21st. Cards in this set will NOT be on the banned list during this run of Sanctum Showdown! Step into a Dark Fantasy with this Featured Set featuring darker and more fantastical variants for this Halloween. Get them dead or alive from Oct 22-Nov 1st.   This season, the dead don't rest, and neither will you. Will you master the Zombie Hordes or get swept up in the chaos? Step into the fray… if you dare. items.title: Balance Updates - Sep 25th, 2025
items.summary: Hey folks! We finally wrangled back control from the Robots, but as it turns out we liked some of their ideas. 🤖🧠 While most of the tech experiment we’ll be reverting today, we will be keeping some of the changes and making some slight tw
items.content:
Hey folks! We finally wrangled back control from the Robots, but as it turns out we liked some of their ideas. 🤖🧠   While most of the tech experiment we’ll be reverting today, we will be keeping some of the changes and making some slight tweaks.  We’ll also be doing some more standard issue adjustments today alongside cleaning up after the Robots.  Let’s get to it!     We will be reverting to the previous versions of the following cards:
  • Killmonger[/*]
  • Cosmo[/*]
  • Shadow King[/*]
  • Alioth[/*]
  • Red Guardian[/*]
  We will be retaining the modified versions of:
  • Negasonic Teenage Warhead[/*]
  • Enchantress[/*]
For Negasonic Teenage Warhead and Enchantress we feel like these were meaningful adjustments that will improve their play patterns as well as help downgrade the total impact that tech cards have on the metagame.  Broadly, we would like to live in a world where players are playing a smaller number of tech cards and ideally many of them meaningfully impact the game with their points as well as their effects.
  • For Negasonic, keeping this change will reduce the likelihood that she will come down and quickly snowball a location, and simply lower the amount of time that she looms over the game.[/*]
  • For Enchantress, this movement towards a larger Point value helps to give her far more proactive applications. Simultaneously it will also dramatically lower the number of games where she is played on the last turn of the game alongside other tech cards to flip the table on how the game was being played up until that point.[/*]
We feel good about these changes for the long term outlook of the game.   Now Shang Chi. We will be making a small adjustment to Shang Chi from the event:

Shang Chi

  • 4/3 - On Reveal: Destroy all enemy cards here that have 10 or more Power.[/*]

  • 4/3 - On Reveal: Destroy an enemy card here that has 10 or more Power.[/*]
We felt like this limited time OTA didn’t quite give us or the community enough time to meaningfully gauge this subtle difference between Shangs. Our hope is that if Shang Chi is single targeting that he will remain a potent check on solitaire-esque huge point decks running wild, but will also warrant players the opportunity to make interesting strategic decisions on whether to stack a location or not with multiple high Power cards. Previously, you would simply never do this if it could be avoided due to how impactful Shang Chi was at countering this line of play. Our hunch is that this dynamic will simply make the game more fun, and we’d like to keep running the experiment.  For now, our plan is to gather more information through the next Golden Gauntlet tournament, then make a more long term decision for Shang Chi.     All things considered, we weren’t sure how the OTA experiment would play out, but generally we feel positive about it.  We recognize that tech is a bit more prominent as a premier strategy than we’d like, but tackling the problem is tricky.  We felt like this experiment generated a ton of useful information for how to position tech in the long term, and we’ll keep working on the issue. Please give us feedback on what you did and didn’t like about the pseudo-imbalance event! Ok, now that the tech section is primarily over, back to our more standard faire:    

Colleen Wing

  • 2/4 - On Reveal: Discard the card that costs the least from your hand.[/*]
  • 2/4 > 2/3[/*]
Various flavors of Discard decks have been strong for sometime now, and we felt that long term warranted a change.  However, it is difficult to meaningfully adjust points away from the Discard heavy hitters - as when they are working they can generate very large numbers where small nerfs won’t often be meaningfully felt. As a result, we’re dinging an enabler, and given that Colleen Wing tends to be the strongest one, we’re taking a Power away from her so that the Power adjustment will be frequently felt, particularly in the more scrappy games where Discard’s synergies aren’t shining their brightest.    

Agatha Harkness

  • 6/14 - Game Start: Draw Agatha. She controls your cards on even turns.[/*]
  • 6/14 > 6/12[/*]
Agatha is a tricky card to adjust.  Similarly, she’s been performing above expectations for a while now.  We like that a lot of her idiosyncrasies help to create a unique deck all by herself, and that’s something we generally like to preserve.  However, a lot of her strength is that simply she’s a “free” card, but we also feel it is likely she will be relegated to 0 play if we remove that component, which puts us in a tricky position.   For now, we’re removing two Power to try to get her win rate down, but it is likely we revisit her again in the future.  

Stardust

  • 4/7 - Ongoing: Cards can’t be added to locations except by playing or moving them.[/*]
  • 4/7 > 4/6[/*]
Stardust has been one of the stand out tech cards since its release, with both considerable usage and win rate.  This continued and even increased as we expected during The Robot Take Over, affirming our beliefs that although we like Stardust’s tech role in the metagame, that it could stand to lose some Power. We still believe that it will play its role well.    

Viv Vision

  • 3/2 - At the start of each turn, give all cards in your hand +1 Power if you’re winning here. Otherwise, move this to another location.[/*]
  • 3/2 > 3/3[/*]
 

Dormammu

  • 7/10 - Game Start: Begin a Summoning Ritual. (Add step 1 to hand.)[/*]
  • 7/10 > 7/12[/*]
 

Destroyer

  • 6/16 - On Reveal: Destroy your cards at other locations.[/*]
  • 6/16 > 6/18[/*]
Alright, onto some buffs! We’ve seen that Viv Vision’s win rate numbers have simply been poor since release.  She was an exceptionally tricky card to land on in final balancing - we felt that 3/3 posed a potential risk of enabling her to snowball games too quickly, and as a result we decided to release her at 3/2 to hedge against this risk. The numbers have proved otherwise, and while it is possible that 3/3 may actually move the needle too far in the other direction of making her too strong, we want to gather more data and consider more dramatic adjustment to her design if necessary. Similarly Dormammu’s numbers have continued to be low, even after previous adjustments.  We’re trying again by increasing his Power to 12.  His play rate near his release was quite high and sustained for some time - and has plummeted with player realization that he just isn’t very strong.  That implies to us that this is a card that folks find fun, so we’re committed to getting him into a spot where his fans won’t find their win rate embarrassing for enjoying playing with him. Destroyer has been weak for a very long time. Given his considerable drawback and niche applications, we’re giving him some more numbers to play with.  

Awesome Andy

  • 2/1 - Activate: Give one of your cards at each other location +2 Power.[/*]
  • 2/1 > 2/2[/*]
 

Lockjaw

  • 2/2 - Activate: After you play your next card, swap it with one from your deck.[/*]
  • 2/2 > 2/3[/*]
We’re buffing a couple of Activate cards ahead of Jocasta’s release.  We hope that she will enable a variety of fun synergies, and we want to try to make those potential outputs as diverse as possible, so we’re giving some love to a few Activate underachievers. In particular, we hope that folks will be excited about Lockjaw, as our previous buff didn’t quite generate the positive reception that we were expecting.  We’ll keep working on him if that’s what folks want and the numbers permit!    

Mystique

  • 3/0 - On Reveal: If the last card you played has an Ongoing, copy its text. (if able)[/*]
  • 3/0 > 3/1[/*]
Finally, a buff to a fan favorite, and a sneaky (small) nerf to Mr. Negative.  Mystique has a variety of fun applications, but is most often played in Mr. Negative these days.  That’s a deck that we have our eye on, and we think this is a nice happy medium change of improving Mystique’s performance in every non-Negative deck.     Ok that’s all for today.  Please give us feedback on the Robot Invasion event.  Did you enjoy the lack of tech?  What do you think about the roll backs we made? Until next time, happy Snapping!

items.title: Patch Notes: September 16th, 2025
items.summary: PLEASE NOTE: If you haven’t updated your game yet, get the latest in the App Store! FEATURES Deadpool’s Diner is back on September 18! Everyone’s favorite Merc with a Mouth has been cooking up something special this time, and the Diner will
items.content:
PLEASE NOTE: If you haven’t updated your game yet, get the latest in the App Store!  

FEATURES

Deadpool’s Diner is back on September 18!
  • Everyone’s favorite Merc with a Mouth has been cooking up something special this time, and the Diner will be opening back up with a store, a few updated game rules, and for the first time ever: game mode specific locations. [/*]
  • Look for more updates (and Valley of the Baby Hand) in the near future.[/*]
  Snap Packs Card List Sorting
  • Now when you tap on View Cards in Seasonal Spotlight, Collector’s Pack, or Featured Set Snap Packs, you’ll have sorting and filtering capabilities to help you find the card you’re looking for.[/*]
  Borders For Tokens instead of Gold
  • Going forward, all borders available for purchase in the Cosmetics Shop and in a card’s Custom Card shop will be priced in Tokens instead of Gold. [/*]
  • We have also added some existing borders that were previously unavailable for purchase in either shop to their rotations. [/*]
  • Here is a list of all available borders, as well as their old and new prices:[/*]
Border Previous Price New Price Black Cosmic 1000 Tokens 1000 Tokens Rainbow Cosmic 1000 Tokens 1000 Tokens Blue Cosmic 750 Gold 550 Tokens Red Cosmic 750 Gold 550 Tokens Green Cosmic 750 Gold 550 Tokens Pink Cosmic 750 Gold 550 Tokens Orange Cosmic 750 Gold 550 Tokens Gold Cosmic 750 Gold 550 Tokens Blue Neon 400 Gold 300 Tokens Red Neon 400 Gold 300 Tokens Green Neon 400 Gold 300 Tokens Purple Neon 400 Gold 300 Tokens Yellow Neon 750 Gold 550 Tokens White Neon 750 Gold 550 Tokens Copper Metallic 400 Gold 300 Tokens Silver Metallic 750 Gold 550 Tokens Gold Metallic 750 Gold 550 Tokens Blue Distressed 300 Tokens Red Distressed 300 Tokens Black Matte 550 Tokens Red Matte 550 Tokens Red Web 300 Tokens Black Web 550 Tokens  

Winback Experience

We know that one of the biggest challenges for players returning to Snap is catching up on card acquisition. The following combination of features are meant to try and help returning players kickstart the acquisition of new cards. With this Patch release, we're releasing a new set of features for players returning to Snap after having been away for a while.

Welcome Back Calendar

  • We've built a new login calendar that features 28 days of rewards. In addition to Variants, cosmetics, and currencies, players will get new random Cards from varying Series on days 1, 7, 14, 21, and 28. The calendar will be live for 35 days from a player's first session back, so if they miss a couple of days, they still have the opportunity to earn everything on the calendar.[/*]

Bonus Challenge

  • Bonus Challenge is a, well, bonus set of challenges that live on top of the Weekly Challenge. Completing daily missions (e.g. Play 1-Cost Cards) will advance both the Weekly Challenge and Bonus Challenge reward milestones. Players will have 30 days to complete the Bonus Challenge, and does not reset weekly like the Weekly Challenge. The Bonus Challenge is completed when the player completes 50 missions. Bonus Challenge rewards include Variants, other cosmetics, currencies, and Snap Packs.[/*]

Season Pass Discount

  • Returning players will see a 25% discount on the purchase of either the Season Pass, the Season Pass Super Premium, and the upgrade from the Season Pass to the Season Pass Super Premium. If you come back to Snap too close to the end of the current season (<= 10 days), the discount will follow you into the next season. The discount is good for 1 purchase of either the Season Pass and the upgrade to the Season Pass Super Premium, or the Season Pass Super Premium.[/*]

Exclusive Bundles

  • 3 exclusive bundles for returning players will be available in the Shop. All feature great deals on Snap Packs which are making their debut in bundles.[/*]
We hope players returning to Snap find these features helpful and fun, and please let us know your thoughts on how to make a return to Snap even better!    

CARD UPDATES

Kang

  • 5/0 - On Reveal: Look at what your opponent did, then restart the turn. (without this)[/*]
  • 3/4 - Game Start: Replace this with 4 Kangs with text from random cards that Cost 3 or more.[/*]
Kang has been something of a sore spot for all of us for a while now. He's Series 5, a really unique card from the "Big Bad" era, and an exciting character in the canon. He also tests the limits of our game engine, creates ongoing bug stress, and wasn't as fun as we would've liked to trade for those issues. Plus, he turned out to be fairly weak overall, without great balance dials.   Thus, we decided to take the rare "full rework" approach. We've tried a lot of Kangs over time–we wanted to take our time and find one that was resonant and fun, since we didn't have a metagame pressure requiring us to cook as quickly as possible. Eventually, we settled on this design that leans into a different aspect of Kang's narrative–his multiversal presence having many different manifestations across timelines. We hope you enjoy playing with this card as much as we have!    

ART, VFX, & AUDIO

  • Kang’s VFX were updated to match his new ability.[/*]
  • Captain Marvel’s VFX was updated.[/*]
   

Bug Fixes

Gameplay Fixes in 45.x
  • Cards can be played properly after Kate Bishop’s Grapple Arrow has been played
    • It was fixed with a Server Hotfix, but we made additional client changes to this as well.[/*]
    [/*]
  • Issues with Miles Morales not creating a 1 cost copy after moving a card and playing him on the Cloning Vats location has been resolved[/*]
  • Issues with H.E.R.B.I.E. being activated and then unable to open in focused view during gameplay have been resolved[/*]
  • “Hand full!” whiff message from Moira X should no longer appear for her opponent when the player’s hand is full[/*]
  Card and Location Art Fixes in 45.x
  • VFX issues with Invisible Woman First Steps played on Isle of Silence have been resolved[/*]
  • Issues with Lockjaw’s VFX on both the player and opponent side have been resolved[/*]
  • Giganto’s VFX no longer displays an artifact around the retreat button[/*]
  • VFX and SFX for an opponent’s Nicholas Scratch will no longer activate when players drag a card[/*]
  • VFX issues that could occur when copies of Air Walker from Bar Sinister are destroyed have been resolved[/*]
  • VFX issues for Cosmic Ghost Rider that would occur when the opposing player has only played one card at the location have been resolved[/*]
  • Terrax the Tamer’s VFX should no longer clip on the screen edge when played on the rightmost location[/*]
  • Cosmic Ghost Rider’s VFX should no longer clip with the opponent’s avatar[/*]
  • Khonshu’s VFX should no longer clip with location text and cards[/*]
  • Issues with Khonshu’s Cost / Power clipping with its VFX after getting discarded in the Waxing phase have been resolved[/*]
  Cards Shop Fixes in 45.x
  • The previous Season Pass card should now be available in the Seasonal Series 5 pack of the weekly spotlight on the 1st week of a new season[/*]
  • Newly Released Card and other exclusive offer bundles can now appear in the shop without requiring the shop to refresh[/*]
  • Title formatting issues on certain bundles have been resolved[/*]
  • Glowing VFX issues on certain exclusive offer bundles have been resolved[/*]
  Other Fixes in 45.x
  • Tapping on the Avatar button on the Main main, should now redirect you to edit your active deck cosmetics in the Collection screen[/*]
  • Miles Morales should now appear in search results after using “Spider” or “Spider-Man” in filter search[/*]
  • Visual issues with boosters on Season Pass screen have been resolved[/*]
  • Certain bundle types should no longer disappear on the carousel after restarting the app on Android devices[/*]
  • Certain bundles types should now be appearing correctly in the carousel on all iOS devices[/*]
  • Issues with the current shop position not persisting after navigating away and returning to the shop tab have been resolved[/*]
  • Visual issues with the Proving Grounds conquest tower occasionally appearing behind other conquest towers no longer occurs[/*]
  • Silver Glimmer Flare visuals have been improved[/*]
  • Token icon no longer overlaps with currency amount in Custom Card Shop[/*]
  • Resolved an issue with "Make Me a Deck" where certain card names in other languages would exceed the character limit of the deck name and prevent the deck from being created[/*]
  • Minor VFX issues overlapping the Shop UI no longer occur[/*]
  PC Fixes in 45.x
  • “Go to Shop” button functionality issues have been resolved[/*]
  Localization Fixes in 45.x
  • Bundle titles overlapping with ribbon UI issues have been resolved[/*]
